memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t **p, const void *src, size_t sz, int be)
memberdef.name: put

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t *h, size_t off, const void *src, size_t sz, int be)
memberdef.name: put_at

memberdef.argsstring: (FILE *fp, wfm_filetype_t ft, int sample_type, int endian, double fs, double fc, size_t total_samples)
memberdef.name: wfm_writer_open

briefdescription.para: Open a writer on an already-open stream.

parameterdescription.para: destination (binary mode for raw/blue; text-safe for csv).
container; SIGMF is treated as RAW here.
wire type (wavegen order); see file header.
expected complex-sample count for the BLUE header (0 if unknown; close() patches the actual count when fp is seekable).

simplesect.para: Writer handle, or NULL on bad args / allocation. BLUE writes its 512-byte header here.

briefdescription.para: Convert and write n complex samples.

simplesect.para: Number of complex samples written (== n on success, else short).

briefdescription.para: Flush, patch the BLUE data_size from the actual count (if seekable), and free the writer (does not close the FILE*).

simplesect.para: 0 on success, non-zero on a write/seek error.

memberdef.argsstring: (int stype, int be, char *out, size_t cap)
memberdef.name: sigmf_datatype

memberdef.argsstring: (int sample_type, int endian, double fs, double fc, const wfm_segment_t *segs, size_t n_segs)
memberdef.name: wfm_sigmf_meta_json

briefdescription.para: Build a SigMF .sigmf-meta JSON document for a generated capture.

detaileddescription.para: global carries core:datatype (from sample_type+endian, e.g. "ci16_le"), core:sample_rate, core:version "1.0.0", and a wfmgen description/author. captures is a single capture at sample 0 / frequency fc. annotations has one entry per composer segment — sample span, frequency edges (fc + freq ± bandwidth/2, bandwidth ≈ fs/sps for symbol/chip types), a core:label of the waveform type, and custom wfmgen:* parameters.

simplesect.para: malloc'd JSON string (caller frees), or NULL on allocation failure.
